Operation 'put-users-by-id' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original summary and description are too vague. Added clarity about what fields can be updated (referencing UserCreate schema), what is returned (User object), and that partial updates are supported. This helps AI agents understand the operation's scope and effects.

data.summary_suggestion: Update user profile and account information
data.description_suggestion: Updates an existing user's profile information including name, email, and other account details. Accepts a UserCreate object with fields to be updated. Returns the updated User object with all current properties. Requires the user ID in the path. Partial updates are supported - only provided fields will be modified.
data.reasoning: Original summary and description are too vague. Added clarity about what fields can be updated (referencing UserCreate schema), what is returned (User object), and that partial updates are supported. This helps AI agents understand the operation's scope and effects.

message: Operation 'delete-users-by-id' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description lacks critical context about permanence, cascading effects, and response format. Enhanced to clarify that deletion is permanent, explain potential side effects on related data, and specify the expected response. This is crucial for AI agents to understand the destructive nature of this operation.

data.summary_suggestion: Delete user account and associated data
data.description_suggestion: Permanently deletes a user account identified by the provided user ID. This operation removes the user and may cascade to related data. Returns a success response (204 No Content) on successful deletion. This action cannot be undone.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks critical context about permanence, cascading effects, and response format. Enhanced to clarify that deletion is permanent, explain potential side effects on related data, and specify the expected response. This is crucial for AI agents to understand the destructive nature of this operation.

message: Operation 'get-users-search' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Summary is concise and clear. Description needs enhancement to specify what search criteria are supported, clarify that results are returned as a list of User objects, and mention pagination/filtering capabilities for better AI agent understanding of capabilities.

data.description_suggestion: Searches for users matching specified criteria. Accepts search parameters (e.g., name, email) as query parameters. Returns a list of User objects matching the search criteria. Supports filtering and pagination through query parameters.
data.reasoning: Summary is concise and clear. Description needs enhancement to specify what search criteria are supported, clarify that results are returned as a list of User objects, and mention pagination/filtering capabilities for better AI agent understanding of capabilities.

data.description_suggestion: Adds a new member to the specified group. Accepts member details via MemberCreate schema. Returns the created Member object with 201 status. The member is immediately added to the group and becomes accessible via member queries.
